title: Pan-Seared Gyoza with Miso Dipping Sauce
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring crispy pan-seared gyoza served with a tangy miso dipping sauce.

ingredients.name: pan-fried gyoza
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: white miso paste
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Pan-fry the gyoza in a little oil until crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste, sour soy sauce, and a splash of water to make the dipping sauce.
Serve the pan-fried gyoza with the miso dipping sauce for a delicious and authentic Japanese experience.
Optional: garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds for added flavor and texture.
